name: AliExpress Open Platform API
description: AliExpress Open Platform provides APIs for sellers, affiliates, dropshippers, and logistics partners to manage products, orders, shipping, payments, and more on the AliExpress marketplace. The API follows the TOP (Taobao Open Platform) gateway pattern where most methods are invoked via a central gateway endpoint with a method parameter.
